case_title: UYEDA, MICHAEL VS JAPAN VIDEO & MEDIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO TAKESHI ONISHI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY UYEDA, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT JAPAN VIDEO & MEDIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UYEDA, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAPAN VIDEO & MEDIA, INC. $389.19 PRINCIPAL, $122.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $511.19, DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. JUDGMENT IS RENDERED FOR PLAINTIFF ONLY BECAUSE DVDS ARE REUSABLE AND DEFENDANT FAILED TO MITIGATE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF IS ADMONISHED NOT TO ENGAGE IN TAMPERING AGAIN. DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE THE RIGHT TO REFUSE SERVICE TO PLAINTIFF WITHOUT REFUND OF HIS MEMBERSHIP FEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JAPAN VIDEO & MEDIA, INC.
